items_flat.title_zh: AI 輔助漏洞發現規模明顯攀升
items_flat.summary_en: Industry analysis highlighted a sharp rise in high-severity vulnerabilities found with Mythos-era systems, raising both defensive opportunity and disclosure-capacity concerns.
items_flat.summary_zh: 產業分析指出 Mythos 世代系統協助發現的高嚴重度漏洞大增，同時帶來防禦效益與揭露處理量能壓力。

items_flat.title_zh: PerceptionRubrics 推進貼近人類感知的多模態評測
items_flat.summary_en: The benchmark pairs 1,038 dense images with more than 12,000 instance-specific rubrics to expose brittleness hidden by aggregate multimodal scores.
items_flat.summary_zh: 這項基準以 1,038 張高資訊密度圖片搭配逾 12,000 條個別評分規則，揭露總體多模態分數掩蓋的脆弱性。

anthropic.title_zh: AI 輔助漏洞發現規模明顯攀升
anthropic.summary_en: Industry analysis highlighted a sharp rise in high-severity vulnerabilities found with Mythos-era systems, raising both defensive opportunity and disclosure-capacity concerns.
anthropic.summary_zh: 產業分析指出 Mythos 世代系統協助發現的高嚴重度漏洞大增，同時帶來防禦效益與揭露處理量能壓力。

frontier_other.title_zh: PerceptionRubrics 推進貼近人類感知的多模態評測
frontier_other.summary_en: The benchmark pairs 1,038 dense images with more than 12,000 instance-specific rubrics to expose brittleness hidden by aggregate multimodal scores.
frontier_other.summary_zh: 這項基準以 1,038 張高資訊密度圖片搭配逾 12,000 條個別評分規則，揭露總體多模態分數掩蓋的脆弱性。

brief_en: AI-assisted vulnerability discovery scales sharply | PerceptionRubrics targets human-aligned multimodal evaluation
brief_zh: AI 輔助漏洞發現規模明顯攀升｜PerceptionRubrics 推進貼近人類感知的多模態評測
